    public partial global::Demo.AnimalDto Map(global::Demo.Animal a)
    {
        global::System.ArgumentNullException.ThrowIfNull(a);
        return a switch
        {
            global::Demo.Dog __s => Map(__s),
            global::Demo.Cat __s => Map(__s),
            _ => throw new global::System.ArgumentException("DwarfMapper: no [MapDerivedType] registered for runtime type '" + a.GetType() + "' mapping to 'global::Demo.AnimalDto'.", nameof(a)),
        };
    }
    public partial global::Demo.DogDto Map(global::Demo.Dog d)
    {
        global::System.ArgumentNullException.ThrowIfNull(d);
        return new global::Demo.DogDto
        {
            Breed = d.Breed,
            Name = d.Name,
        };
    }
    public partial global::Demo.CatDto Map(global::Demo.Cat c)
    {
        global::System.ArgumentNullException.ThrowIfNull(c);
        return new global::Demo.CatDto
        {
            Lives = c.Lives,
            Name = c.Name,
        };
    }
